q: No sooner did she finish her presentation than the audience began asking questions. (Use 'as soon as'.) 2024
a: As soon as she finished her presentation, the audience began asking questions.

q: No sooner had they had their dinner than the ceiling crashed onto the dining table. (Use 'As soon as ...'.) 2025
a: As soon as they had their dinner, the ceiling crashed onto the dining table.

q: No sooner did I finish writing my essay than I heard the bell ring. (Change the sentence, beginning with 'As soon as ...'.) 2026
a: As soon as I finished writing my essay, I heard the bell ring.
